name: Zobo
intro: A delicious drink from the northern part of Nigeria, this beverage is easy to make and requires only a couple of ingredients. It has a slightly sweet and sour taste, which can be enhanced with other flavours such as ginger, vanilla, cinnamon or nutmeg.
method: Place the tamarind pulp, fresh ginger and water in a large pot and bring to a rapid boil. Cover the pot and simmer on medium heat for 15 minutes. Leave to cool completely for up to 1 hour.

Place the zobo leaves, pineapple, ginger, cloves and sugar/ syrup in a large pot and cover with 10 cups of hot water. Bring to a boil then cover the pot and simmer on low-medium heat for 15 minutes. Take oﬀ the heat and leave to steep and cool for up to 3-4 hours or overnight (for a more intense flavour).
Pour the zobo into a large jug, taste for sweetness and add more sugar/syrup, or add more cold water if needed, along with ice and sliced citrus fruit.
